name: How do I know if a siding quote is actually a good deal?

mainEntity.name: How do I know if a siding quote is actually a good deal?

acceptedAnswer.text: The best value usually comes from a contractor who explains materials, shows past work, gives a detailed scope, and stands behind the installation. That combination is often worth more than the lowest bid if you want the siding to last.
acceptedAnswer.description: A good quote is detailed, transparent, and backed by real experience. The lowest price is not always the best value if it leaves out repairs or warranty coverage.
